description_long: This is a stylized doll with a large, textured mass of brown hair that covers much of its head and partially obscures its face from certain angles. The doll has a round face with large, expressive blue eyes and a wide, toothy smile, giving it a cheerful and animated appearance. Its arms are outstretched to the sides, and the hands are simple, rounded shapes. The doll is dressed in a black shirt with a white logo or text on the front, paired with black pants and black shoes. The overall body proportions are cartoonish, with a large head and small limbs, typical of collectible or decorative dolls. The surface of the hair is highly textured, while the clothing and skin have a smoother, matte finish.
description: A cartoonish doll with a large, textured brown hairstyle, big blue eyes, a wide smile, and dressed in black clothing with a white logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's expressive face, blue eyes, wide smile, and the front of its black shirt with a white logo.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the voluminous brown hair, with only one arm and part of the face visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the large, textured brown hair and the plain black clothing, with both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hair's volume and texture, with the side of the face and one arm visible.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual black T-shirt with a white logo or text on the front, paired with plain black pants and black shoes; the style is simple and modern, with no visible patterns or brand influences.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms extended outward to the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling with a wide, open mouth showing teeth, large blue eyes open wide, and neutral eyebrows, conveying a cheerful and friendly demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Large, voluminous, and textured brown hair with a shaggy, layered appearance that covers much of the head and partially obscures the face.
